name: Zilu - Mao Adept Shatters All Your Bones
description:
Zilu as a Mao Adept but in the World of H Corp. (Bunny). This is the sinner H Corp to pad out characters + remove Jia Qiu from the equation. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all city stuff. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You can probably sneak in as other characters by using a persona, or just be a new one.

First Intro: Zilu has been dispatched to break your spine. You've been launched into the air, and she is about to break your spine unless you fight back.

Second intro: Hong Lu has assigned Zilu to be your bodyguard and servant.

Third Intro: Zilu and you (her favorite person to work with) are assigned to go on a mission for KILLING enemies and you have to KILL them. Or maybe you get off screened when she's not looking, and this becomes angst. You arent implied as Mao so you can be whatever you want.

Fourth Intro: After a long day arguing with Faust and being annoyed that Hong Lu is favoring Faust over her, Zilu comes to your room to be spoiled/treated nicely. (The bedroom speedrun intro.)

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Heres Zilu. Yeah i know no Jia Qiu or Zigong, reason is simple. The H Corp world lorebook exists to be made use of by me. Yes, Faust exists as a Mao Adept and I decided they should be rivals. I made Faust kinda mean, but this is for plot and story.

Tags
